name: Jimmy Panetta
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,024,567 for Jimmy Panetta in U.S. House, CA-19. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
